persona.mission: Create a Veterinary CRM that feels like a high-end medical instrument—precise, sterile yet warm, and radically efficient.
core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix 'Medical Precision' with 'Industrial Design' aesthetics.
Emotion First: Trust and Efficiency. The UI should feel 'snappy' and 'solid'.
Content is King: Data legibility is paramount. High contrast, clear hierarchy.
Negative Space: Use spacing to group logic, not just for decoration.
Contrast: High contrast Orange vs Deep Obsidian for focus management.

project_context.theme_strategy: Dual-Mode with 'Obsidian' default. Primary Orange accent.

primary.usage: Primary Actions, Active States, Key Metrics
primary.description: Vitality and Action. Use sparingly for high impact.

surface.description: Slightly elevated surface for content containers.

dashboard_grid.classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6

buttons.primary: bg-orange-500 hover:bg-orange-600 text-white font-medium shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(249,115,22,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(249,115,22,0.5)] transition-all

inputs.base: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-orange-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-orange-500 transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

images.description: Clean, minimalist studio shot of a dog. Use for Login or Landing Hero.
Professional veterinarian examining a patient. Use for 'Doctors' or 'Appointments' section.
High-tech medical equipment usage. Use for 'Gabinetes' or 'Services'.
Cheerful pets. Use for 'Patients' or 'Breeds' section.

universal_guidelines: NEVER use gradients for text readability. Keep text high contrast.
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #09090b or #121212 for less eye strain.
Interactive elements MUST have a hover state.
Forms: aligned to the left, labels above inputs.
Mobile Responsiveness: Sidebar becomes a bottom sheet or hamburger menu.

instructions_to_main_agent.theme_setup: Modify tailwind.config.js to extend colors with the specific 'orange-500' and 'zinc-950' palette defined here. Ensure 'dark' class is applied by default to html/body.
instructions_to_main_agent.layout_setup: Create a 'DashboardLayout' component that handles the Sidebar and Topbar structure. Use 'Outlet' for page content.
instructions_to_main_agent.component_usage: Use shadcn/ui components but override default rounded radii to 'md' or 'sm' for a sharper look. Override default blue focus rings with orange.
instructions_to_main_agent.landing_page: The landing page should be high-impact, using the 'hero_dog' image and large 'Manrope' typography. 'Get Started' button must be the primary orange CTA.
